visible_entities.desc: hand with dark skin tone, index finger extended
blue plastic solitaire game board with circular holes

visible_entities.position: inside the holes of the board

atomic_facts.fact: A hand reaches into the frame from the top right.
The index finger touches a marble located on the right side of the blue board.
The game board is resting on a light grey, textured surface.

spatial: The blue solitaire board is in the center of the frame, resting on a grey surface. The hand is positioned above and to the right of the board, interacting with the marbles placed within the board's holes.
state_changes: game board and hand appear, hand touches marbles

visible_entities.desc: blue circular plastic tray with a grid of holes
hand with fingers holding a marble

atomic_facts.fact: A hand is placing a blue marble into a hole in the tray.
The tray contains multiple dark marbles already placed in the holes.

spatial: The blue plastic tray is in the center of the frame. The marbles are inside the holes of the tray. The hand is above the tray, reaching down to place a marble.

visible_entities.desc: blue circular plastic game board with concentric rings of holes and dark glass marbles

visible_entities.action: reaching down towards the game board

atomic_facts.fact: A hand enters the frame from the top.
The hand reaches towards the blue game board.
Dark glass marbles are placed in the holes of the board.
The game board rests on a grey surface.

spatial: The blue circular game board is positioned in the center of the frame. The human hand is located above the board, reaching down towards it. The board is resting on top of a grey surface.
state_changes: hand reaches down and manipulates board
